name: Middle Back Stretch
shortDescription: A static stretch to lengthen the muscles of the thoracic (middle) back region.
instructions: Sit or stand with arms extended in front. Clasp your hands and round your upper back, reaching forward to feel a gentle stretch along your middle back. Hold the position without bouncing.
steps: Sit or stand with feet hip-width apart.
Extend your arms straight in front and clasp your hands.
Round your upper back and push your hands forward.
Tuck your chin slightly toward your chest.
Hold the stretch for 20–30 seconds and release.
commonMistakes: Arching the lower back instead of rounding the upper back
breathing: Breathe slowly and evenly throughout the stretch.
